purpose: wasm-bindgen --target web output (pkg/) used as the @wasm alias when building the vendored rhwp-studio editor. Supplied here so the studio build does not need the Rust/wasm-pack toolchain; pinned to match third_party/rhwp@v0.7.19.
update: npm pack @rhwp/core@<version>; tar xzf rhwp-core-<version>.tgz; cp package/{rhwp.js,rhwp_bg.wasm,rhwp.d.ts,rhwp_bg.wasm.d.ts,package.json,LICENSE} apps/studio-host/vendor/rhwp-core/; then bump the matching third_party/rhwp pin in config/rhwp-studio-overrides.json.
